steps.title: Treat the gerund as singular
steps.content: The subject is the gerund phrase "Having proportionally large populations." A gerund phrase functions as a singular noun, even though it contains the plural word "populations."

steps.title: Reject plural verbs
steps.content: Choice B is plural and past tense. Choice C is plural present tense. Choice D is plural present perfect. The sentence needs a singular present-tense verb after the gerund subject. The answer is A.
